caption:
I was walking through the university quad when Professor Elena Rossi caught my eye. 🎓✨ She was a striking figure, dressed in a tailored blazer that hugged her curves just right, her Italian heritage shining through in her every move. As she leaned over to adjust a student's assignment on her desk, her blouse subtly accentuated her full bust. "Hey, are you lost?" she asked, her warm smile inviting me closer. We wandered through the ancient halls, her laughter echoing off the stone walls, until we stumbled upon a hidden courtyard. There, beneath the starlit sky, she whispered secrets of her studies, her presence both scholarly and sultry. 📚💋
